'''Zurros''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Zurros attempted to play both [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] and [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalists]] against each other in the Senate, until [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] ordered [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] to assassinate him on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. However, Vos merely frightened him into supporting Confederate interests, in order to forestall the problem of having to deal with his replacement and to avoid killing. Dooku approved of the intelligent move.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' {{1st}} {{Hologram}}

==Sources==
